name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Sysinternals SDelete File Deletion
notes:
This Building Block detects the deletion of files by Sysinternals SDelete.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
SIGMA Title: File Deleted Via Sysinternals SDelete
SIGMA Description: Detects the deletion of files by the Sysinternals SDelete utility. It looks for the common name pattern used to rename files.


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Sysinternals SDelete File Deletion on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Deleted
when the event matches File Extension (custom) is any of [AAA or ZZZ]
when the event matches File Directory (custom) is any of \Wireshark\radius\dictionary.alcatel-lucent.aaa
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Sysinternals SDelete File Deletion on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Deleted
AND when the event matches File Extension (custom) is any of [AAA or ZZZ]
AND NOT when the event matches File Directory (custom) is any of \Wireshark\radius\dictionary.alcatel-lucent.aaa
